label: reject

card.title: Implement CSV export for the report table
card.description: Add a function that serializes the report rows to CSV and triggers a download.
card.technicalNotes: Quote fields containing commas/quotes/newlines per RFC 4180. Stream for large tables. Tested.
isc: Exports exportCsv(rows, columns) producing RFC 4180-compliant CSV text
Quotes and escapes fields containing commas, quotes, or newlines
Triggers a browser download of the generated file

iscVerdicts.criterion: Exports exportCsv(rows, columns) producing RFC 4180-compliant CSV text
